title: [codereview-pass1.3 robustness] rf_health.rs: test should be parametrized for different alpha values to prevent future breakage on tuning
description: Instead of hard-coded expectation, parametrize rssi_avg_multiple_samples and ema_convergence tests with different shift values. This follows the 'parametrize or update test' instruction. file: rust/lichen-core/src/rf_health.rs:404
